subject: FW: the conference this past Saturday
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Marvin Minsky [mailto:minsky@media.mit.edu] 
Sent: Sunday, December 09, 2007 1:05 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: the conference this past Saturday

Hi.   I tried to reach JE to discuss the "curriculum draft" of books  
to for him to read,
but could not reach him either in NY or at the Island.
Any chance to talk to him -- or should I just go on filling out more
details?
